subcodes.first_line: God willing, thou shalt drink from the ocean of divine bounty and find its sweetness in all the heavenly names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله از دریای عنایت الهی بیاشامی و لذت آنرا بیابی در جمیع نامهای آسمانی
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @suffering and imprisonment
